connect.elastic.kcql: INSERT INTO pg_lecture SELECT * FROM university.public.lecture PK id;INSERT INTO pg_lecture_course SELECT * FROM university.public.lecture_course PK id;INSERT INTO pg_lecture_material SELECT * FROM university.public.lecture_material PK id;INSERT INTO pg_university SELECT * FROM university.public.university PK id;INSERT INTO pg_institute SELECT * FROM university.public.institute PK id;INSERT INTO pg_department SELECT * FROM university.public.department PK id;INSERT INTO pg_speciality SELECT * FROM university.public.speciality PK id;INSERT INTO pg_department_specialities SELECT * FROM university.public.department_specialities PK id;INSERT INTO pg_student SELECT * FROM university.public.student PK id;INSERT INTO pg_student_group SELECT * FROM university.public.student_group PK id;INSERT INTO pg_schedule SELECT * FROM university.public.schedule PK id;INSERT INTO pg_attendance SELECT * FROM university.public.attendance PK id
